title: lotus scoparius
intro: Lotus scoparius, also known as broom lotus or golden lotus, is a perennial aquatic plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lotus scoparius include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as a natural diuretic and laxative. Lotus scoparius is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is commonly used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
